desc:
Toxic Valley Treasure Map #1 dig site: To find this treasure, you have to go to the Becker farm house. It is located northeast of Vault 76 in Toxic Valley. West of the farm house you will find a dilapidated house only a corner of the house remains, the dig site can be found next to the dilapidated house.
Grid D8 (X: 1504.6, Y: 3106.7)
Submitted By MrCrazy
